description: Domain invariant declarations for PHR (Personal Health Record) product

invariants.name: Patient identity verification
invariants.description: Patient identity must be verified before any record access

invariants.name: Tenant data isolation
invariants.description: Patient data must be isolated by tenant with no cross-tenant leakage

invariants.name: Consent grant lifecycle
invariants.description: Consent grants must follow valid state transitions (granted -> active -> revoked -> expired)

invariants.name: FHIR resource data integrity
invariants.description: FHIR resources must maintain referential integrity and schema compliance

invariants.name: Patient access audit trail
invariants.description: All patient data access must be logged with user, timestamp, purpose, and outcome

invariants.name: Consent-based access control
invariants.description: Data access must be gated by valid consent for the requested purpose

invariants.name: Data sovereignty enforcement
invariants.description: Patient data must be stored and processed according to data sovereignty requirements

invariants.name: Break-glass emergency access
invariants.description: Emergency break-glass access must be audited, time-boxed, and post-reviewed

invariants.name: Patient data access matrix
invariants.description: Access rights must follow patient/caregiver/clinician/admin matrix

invariants.name: FHIR R4 validation
invariants.description: All FHIR resources must validate against R4 specification and profiles
